div.t-attf-class: {{env.isSmall ? 'o_grid_view o_view_controller o_action o_action_delegate_scroll': 'timesheet-timer position-relative d-md-flex align-items-center py-2 border-bottom cy-view'}}

div.class: col-sm-12 col-md-12 col-lg-12 d-flex align-items-center gap-4

div.t-attf-title: Difference between the number of {{tbData.planned_hour}} allocated to the task and the number of {{tbData.effective_hour}} recorded
Difference between the number of {{employeeData.planned_hour}} allocated to the task and the number of {{employeeData.effective_hour}} recorded
Difference between the number of {{tbData.planned_hour}} allocated to the task and the number of {{tbData.effective_hour}} recorded
